character.name: Mangetonchapeau
character.description: Another new face in Fallen London! How intriguing!

currentDomicile.name: A Dripstone-Snared Third City Sub-Temple
currentDomicile.description: A stalagmite: and at its heart, a black space of silent sacred horror.

mantelpieceItem.name: Polythreme Drinking Vessel
mantelpieceItem.description: A sweetener of prospective voters when full. A chastiser of the enemy's supporters when empty.

scrapbookStatus.name: Subtle
scrapbookStatus.description: You often go round a problem rather than through it.
scrapbookStatus.availableAt: You can reliably increase this with the card 'Whispers from the Surface: The Great Game'.

possessions.name: Dangerous
possessions.description: Strength, ferocity, soldiering.
possessions.availableAt: Dangerous improves as you attempt Dangerous tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Hard-Earned Lessons at your Lodgings.

possessions.name: Persuasive
possessions.description: Wit, charm, plausibility.
possessions.availableAt: Persuasive improves as you attempt Persuasive tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Confident Smiles at your Lodgings.

possessions.name: Shadowy
possessions.description: Stealth, subtlety, cunning.
possessions.availableAt: Shadowy improves as you attempt Shadowy tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Hastily Scrawled Warning Notes at your Lodgings.

possessions.name: Watchful
possessions.description: Observation, intelligence, deduction.
possessions.availableAt: Watchful improves as you attempt Watchful tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Sudden Insights at your Lodgings.

possessions.name: Bizarre
possessions.description: No one knows quite what to make of your possessions and associations.

possessions.name: Dreaded
possessions.description: Your possessions and associates show you're someone to be avoided.

possessions.name: Making Waves
possessions.description: You have a reputation! Now be sure to keep your name before the public. Making Waves will drop over time. It is merely a distraction until you've achieved Person of Some Importance status.
possessions.availableAt: You can gain Making Waves in a wide variety of places, including publishing Short Stories; using items like Incendiary Gossip; and inviting friends to social events in your Lodgings.

possessions.name: Respectable
possessions.description: Your possessions and associates show you're someone to be respected.

possessions.name: Identified with a Philosophy:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Identified with a Philosophy: The Implacable Method
possessions.description: Which road to truth do you follow?

possessions.name: Identified with a School:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Identified with a School: The Nocturnals, radicals who relish the freedom from traditional forms - and moralities - that the darkness of the Neath permits
possessions.levelDescription: The Nocturnals, radicals who relish the freedom from traditional forms - and moralities - that the darkness of the Neath permits
possessions.description: Fallen London has its own artistic movements. Perhaps you ignore them, but they don't ignore you.

possessions.name: Identified with a Tradition:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Identified with a Tradition: The Forms of the Tomb-Colonies - elegant, punctilious, and effective
possessions.levelDescription: The Forms of the Tomb-Colonies - elegant, punctilious, and effective
possessions.description: A number of martial traditions are popular in the Neath.

possessions.name: You have pledged your support to -
possessions.nameAndLevel: You have pledged your support to - Feducci – Contender of London
possessions.description: Who has your vote?

possessions.name: You Make Your Toasts To:
possessions.nameAndLevel: You Make Your Toasts To: The Gracious Widow - merciless, efficient, mysterious. Immortal?
possessions.levelDescription: The Gracious Widow - merciless, efficient, mysterious. Immortal?
possessions.description: Which of London's criminal luminaries do you admire?

possessions.name: Ambition: Light Fingers!
possessions.nameAndLevel: Ambition: Light Fingers! 2,500 - You completed your Ambition, smuggling the Hybrid to the ceiling where it can thrive
possessions.levelDescription: You completed your Ambition, smuggling the Hybrid to the ceiling where it can thrive
possessions.description: Progress in stealing the greatest treasures of the Neath.

possessions.name: Preparations for Ensnaring a Moon-Mother
possessions.description: You have built what Dr Vaughan asked you to build. But what is it?

possessions.name: A Turncoat
possessions.description: You are becoming known for your uncertain loyalties. Don't let this rise beyond 3, or you may find options closed to you.

possessions.name: Disgruntlement among the Students
possessions.description: How are people feeling in your laboratory? Stifled? Silenced? Unable to progress their research?

possessions.name: Nightmares
possessions.description: Nightmares are becoming a problem. Some nights you hardly dare sleep. If this reaches 5, bad things may begin to happen. Don't let it reach 8.

possessions.name: Wounds
possessions.description: Wounds are becoming troublesome. At 8, they may become fatal. Which would be inconvenient.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: Death by Water
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: Death by Water 6
possessions.description: Dreams of drowning and worse.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: I Shot the Albatross
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: I Shot the Albatross 5
possessions.description: Dreams of high places and heavy burdens.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: Is Someone There?
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: Is Someone There? 3
possessions.description: Dreams about being watched.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: The Burial of the Dead
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: The Burial of the Dead 7
possessions.description: Dreams about the tomb-colonies and other dark places.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: The Fire Sermon
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: The Fire Sermon 4
possessions.description: Dreams about flames.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: the Forests of the Night
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: the Forests of the Night 2
possessions.description: Dreams of adoration, and ecstatic approach.

possessions.name: Having Recurring Dreams: What the Thunder Said
possessions.nameAndLevel: Having Recurring Dreams: What the Thunder Said 15
possessions.description: Dreams about the sky.

possessions.name: Austere
possessions.description: You have been known to resist the lures and temptations of earthly pleasures.
possessions.availableAt: You can reliably increase this on the card 'Altars and Alms-Houses: the Church'.

possessions.name: Daring
possessions.description: You have shown yourself dauntless – or rash.
possessions.availableAt: You can reliably increase this using the card 'The Roof-Tops: Urchins'.

possessions.name: Magnanimous
possessions.description: Perhaps you have hidden motives for your kindness. But you've done good things.

possessions.name: Melancholy
possessions.description: There is a sadness on you.

possessions.name: Steadfast
possessions.description: You have been known to keep your word.

possessions.name: Subtle
possessions.description: You often go round a problem rather than through it.
possessions.availableAt: You can reliably increase this with the card 'Whispers from the Surface: The Great Game'.

possessions.name: Seduction: Honey-Sipping Heiress
possessions.nameAndLevel: Seduction: Honey-Sipping Heiress 3 - Days of Honey and Roses
possessions.description: A charming young woman.

possessions.name: Seduction: Honey-Sipping Jewel-Thief
possessions.description: A dramatic young gentleman.

possessions.name: Connected: Benthic
possessions.description: Colleagues and acquaintances in Fallen London's radical, secular seat of higher learning.
possessions.availableAt: You can increase this at the University, or by using an Endowment of a University Fellowship purchased at the Bazaar; or by donating your finds from Archaeological Expeditions.

possessions.name: Favours: Bohemians
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Bohemians
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Bohemians 33/55 - Known to the rarefied minds of Court
possessions.levelDescription: Known to the rarefied minds of Court
possessions.description: If London's artists don't recognise you, they may not be drunk enough.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this using an Ornate Typewriter.

possessions.name: Favours: Constables
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Constables
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Constables 21/55 - Known to the guards of New Newgate
possessions.levelDescription: Known to the guards of New Newgate
possessions.description: London's officers greet you cordially.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using a Antique Constable's Badge.

possessions.name: Favours: Criminals
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Criminals
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Criminals 26/55 - Known even in Gaider's Mourn, far across the zee
possessions.levelDescription: Known even in Gaider's Mourn, far across the zee
possessions.description: On first-name terms with cut-purses, house-breakers, counterfeiters and what, in other cities, would probably be called the underworld.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using an Old Bone Skeleton Key.

possessions.name: Favours: Hell
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Hell
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Hell 13/55 - Known to the infernal diplomats of the Brass Embassy
possessions.levelDescription: Known to the infernal diplomats of the Brass Embassy
possessions.description: The devils smile at you with familiarity.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this at Mrs. Plenty's Carnival or by using a Bright Brass Skull.

possessions.name: Favours: Revolutionaries
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Revolutionaries
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Revolutionaries 21/55 -  Known to those who live ordinary lives but carry out dynamite plots
possessions.levelDescription: Known to those who live ordinary lives but carry out dynamite plots
possessions.description: London's anarchists recognise you in their secret chapbooks.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this using a Red-Feathered Pin.

possessions.name: Favours: Rubbery Men
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Rubbery Men
possessions.description: You have cultivated a familiarity with the Rubbery Men of Fallen London. Polite society does not look kindly upon your new friendships, but perhaps you don't care.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using a Nodule of Pulsating Amber.

possessions.name: Connected: Shroud
possessions.description: Involved with the parlour magic of Spiritualists and clairvoyantes.

possessions.name: Favours: Society
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Society
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Society 34/55 -  Known in the homes of London's noblest families
possessions.levelDescription: Known in the homes of London's noblest families
possessions.description: London's elite don't see everyone, but they see you.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this at the Carnival, or by using an Entry in Slowcake's Exceptionals.

possessions.name: Connected: Summerset
possessions.description: Your standing in Fallen London's wealthy, Anglican university college.
possessions.availableAt: You can increase this at the University, or using an Endowment of a University Fellowship purchased at the Bazaar; or donate your finds from Archaeological Expeditions.

possessions.name: Favours: The Church
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: The Church
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: The Church 22/55 - Known to London's practitioners of the faith, both lay and ecclesiastic
possessions.levelDescription: Known to London's practitioners of the faith, both lay and ecclesiastic
possessions.description: London's theological establishment is well aware of your good deeds and your sins.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this using a Tiny Jewelled Reliquary.

possessions.name: Renown: The Docks
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: The Docks 13/55 - Known up and down the Stolen River
possessions.levelDescription: Known up and down the Stolen River
possessions.description: The zee-captains of Wolfstack Docks tip their hats as you pass.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using an Engraved Pewter Tankard.

possessions.name: Connected: The Duchess
possessions.description: The Duchess is a woman of independent inclinations. Her opinions do not always align with those of the great and the good.
possessions.availableAt: You can increase this at the Duchess' salon in the Shuttered Palace or at Mrs. Plenty's Carnival. In addition, the Duchess despises the game of Pass the Cat; free the cats to win her favour.

possessions.name: Favours: The Great Game
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: The Great Game
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: The Great Game 19/55 - Known to the Elder Continent's Mithridate Office and the Khan's White-and-Golds
possessions.levelDescription: Known to the Elder Continent's Mithridate Office and the Khan's White-and-Golds
possessions.description: The players of the Game may not know your name or your face, but they know your reputation.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using a Copper Cipher Ring.

possessions.name: Connected: The Masters of the Bazaar
possessions.nameAndLevel: Connected: The Masters of the Bazaar 7 - Jokes are Cautiously Shared
possessions.description: You've pleased someone.
possessions.availableAt: The Masters are not easily impressed. Chances to please them are rare and risky. You could try Mrs. Plenty's Carnival, I suppose, if you're bold. And lucky.

possessions.name: Connected: The Widow
possessions.description: Half London's contraband bears her mark. Call her the Gracious Widow. She likes that.
possessions.availableAt: You can increase this at Mrs. Plenty's Carnival or by smuggling in Spite. You can also use O'Boyle's Practical Primer, purchased at the Bazaar.

possessions.name: Favours: Tomb-Colonies
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Tomb-Colonies
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Tomb-Colonies 11/55 - Known in all the quiet cities
possessions.levelDescription: Known in all the quiet cities
possessions.description: You have dealings with the bandaged gentle-persons from the Quiet Cities across the Unterzee.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using a Diary of the Dead.

possessions.name: Favours: Urchins
possessions.description: You've done somebody a good turn. Now, they're in your debt.

possessions.name: Renown: Urchins
possessions.nameAndLevel: Renown: Urchins 9/55 - Known all along the heights of the Flit
possessions.levelDescription: Known all along the heights of the Flit
possessions.description: You've made yourself known to the roof-dwellers of London. They've come to recognise your taste in headwear. "Oi, bigguns!" they say.
possessions.availableAt: Increase this by using a Rookery Password.

possessions.name: A Protégé of...
possessions.description: You have earned the favour and protection of another player.

possessions.name: Acquainted With
possessions.description: A person you know well enough, as the adage has it, to borrow from... but perhaps not well enough to lend to.
possessions.relationshipDescription:
• Vera Weiss (1)
  • Colter (1)
  • Leon57 (1)
  • The Acerbic Licentiate (1)
  • Carragon (1)
  • ouroborouspanda (1)
  • Mordecai Blanc (1)
  • MangetonchapeauII (1)
  • Ellauyz (1)
  • Lynx04 (1)
  • The Heroic Patsy (1)
possessions.availableAt: Send a player a Calling Card to become Acquainted with them. Once Acquainted, you can deepen your relationship using the 'Attend to Matters of the Heart' card at your lodgings.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: Furnace Ancona
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquaintance: Furnace Ancona 13 - Furnace Ancona has removed her helmet in your presence – and acknowledged your caution
possessions.levelDescription: Furnace Ancona has removed her helmet in your presence – and acknowledged your caution
possessions.description: You have an acquaintance beyond purely business dealings with the head of the Tracklayers' Union.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: Silas the Showman
possessions.description: He's not reliable. And Good God he has a thirst.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: The Garrulous Drunk
possessions.description: A habitual patron of the Blind Helmsman sometimes calls you 'friend' with a bit more forceful affection than he calls everyone else 'friend.'

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Honey-Addled Detective
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquaintance: the Honey-Addled Detective 1 - You are now acquainted with the Honey-Addled Detective
possessions.levelDescription: You are now acquainted with the Honey-Addled Detective
possessions.description: An elegant wreck of a man, like a lightning-struck chateau.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Incandescent Bookseller
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquaintance: the Incandescent Bookseller 2 - The Bookseller has moved on to new shores
possessions.levelDescription: The Bookseller has moved on to new shores
possessions.description: A Devil that trades in books, rather than souls. Or at least he hasn't made an offer for yours, yet.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Regretful Soldier
possessions.description: You've made a friend of an old warhorse who's done regrettable things.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Repentant Forger
possessions.description: You've befriended a forger of paintings who now regrets his actions.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Sardonic Music-Hall Singer
possessions.description: Someone in Spite that you know of old.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Starving Poet
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquaintance: the Starving Poet 2 - The Starving Poet escaped... for now, at least
possessions.levelDescription: The Starving Poet escaped... for now, at least
possessions.description: A poor sort of revolutionary.

possessions.name: Acquaintance: the Wry Functionary
possessions.description: A friend in a fairly high place.

possessions.name: A Veilgarden Honey-Den:
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Veilgarden Honey-Den:  2 - The Garden of Earthly Delights
possessions.description: A business opportunity most can only dream of. Or in.

possessions.name: A Boxful of Intrigue
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Boxful of Intrigue 1 - The game begins!
possessions.description: Is this a box best left closed? Will you look anyway?
possessions.availableAt: Gain this through storylets in Spite and certain opportunity cards

possessions.name: A Bringer of Death
possessions.description: Death follows you. Even the true death. (This may ultimately be the key to your future.)

possessions.name: A Clear Path
possessions.description: The way to your Lodgings is clear.

possessions.name: A Connoisseur of Neathy Delights
possessions.description: You are growing wise in the pleasures of the Neath. But it is difficult to remain current! This quality may drop slightly each week.

possessions.name: A Cub's Education
possessions.description: Something has appeared in the Dome of Scales.

possessions.name: A Day in the Life of a Novice Policeman
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Day in the Life of a Novice Policeman 2
possessions.description: We were all beginners once.

possessions.name: Discovered: a Dirigible Mast
possessions.description: You have visited the courtyard of Station VIII.

possessions.name: A Dream of London, Changed
possessions.description: In the Waswood, London is under attack.

possessions.name: A Fearsome Duellist
possessions.description: You have proved your courage and skill by defeating opponents of quality.

possessions.name: A Finder of Heiresses
possessions.description: You found the missing Comtessa... poor soul.

possessions.name: A Friendship with a Bohemian Sculptress
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Friendship with a Bohemian Sculptress 6 - A True Artist
possessions.description: She knows just the right kind of people.
possessions.availableAt: Meet the Sculptress in Veilgarden, or your Lodgings.

possessions.name: A Gift from Balmoral
possessions.description: The Castellan of Balmoral owes the Great Hellbound Railway Board a debt.

possessions.name: A Hunter of Zee-Beasts
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Hunter of Zee-Beasts 3 - You have hunted several zee-beasts
possessions.description: How many strange creatures of the Zee have you pursued?

possessions.name: A Hunter's Instinct for Nightmares
possessions.description: You know how to track the nightmare-beasts of strangers. It is a kindness to fight the nightmares off, but sometimes you may put them to other purposes.

possessions.name: A Knock Behind the Wainscotting
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Knock Behind the Wainscotting 1 - Knocking behind the walls at Mrs Chapman's
possessions.levelDescription: Knocking behind the walls at Mrs Chapman's
possessions.description: Someone – or something – moves behind the walls.

possessions.name: A Marked Month
possessions.description: Seeking the counsel of the calendar.
possessions.availableAt: Gain this by waiting for opportunities to investigate the Affluent Photographer.

possessions.name: A Mirror for Princes
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Mirror for Princes 1 - You encountered the Injurious Princess, an exile from the fabled kingdom of Vesture
possessions.levelDescription: You encountered the Injurious Princess, an exile from the fabled kingdom of Vesture
possessions.description: The Education of a Princess

possessions.name: A Name in Seven Secret Alphabets
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Name in Seven Secret Alphabets 7 - Immortal in Horizon Glyphs
possessions.description: A name known throughout the Neath for its acuity and intellect.

possessions.name: A Name Scrawled in Blood
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Name Scrawled in Blood 7 - Your name is feared!
possessions.description: They will respect your might, or they will suffer for it.

possessions.name: A Name Signed with a Flourish
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Name Signed with a Flourish 7 - Written into Hearts and Minds
possessions.description: A name known throughout the Neath for its artistic triumphs and scandals.

possessions.name: A Name Whispered in Darkness
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Name Whispered in Darkness 7 - Your name is steeped in shadow!
possessions.levelDescription: Your name is steeped in shadow!
possessions.description: What will you see? What has seen you?

possessions.name: A Nocturnal Visitor to the Palace Cellars
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Nocturnal Visitor to the Palace Cellars 6 - You have resolved to steer clear of the Palace Cellars
possessions.levelDescription: You have resolved to steer clear of the Palace Cellars
possessions.description: What goes on behind those five locks?
possessions.availableAt: Gain this through opportunity cards.

possessions.name: A Pact with the Boil of Calamities
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Pact with the Boil of Calamities 1
possessions.description: You made an arrangement with the Boil of Calamities, a Parabolan entity who guards the Skin of the Sun. All it cost you was your former skin.

possessions.name: Discovered: a Patch of Frozen Neath
possessions.nameAndLevel: Discovered: a Patch of Frozen Neath 1 - In Person
possessions.description: You've seen a place in the Neath where all the mud had frozen at once.

possessions.name: A Pawn among Tracklayers
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Pawn among Tracklayers 2 - Appoint a Tracklayer who might be a friend of Fires – and use him to find out what Fires is doing
possessions.levelDescription: Appoint a Tracklayer who might be a friend of Fires – and use him to find out what Fires is doing
possessions.description: The manipulation of your GHR Board is becoming complicated. What do you plan to do in the absence of Furnace Ancona?

possessions.name: Hearts' Game: A Player of the Game
possessions.nameAndLevel: Hearts' Game: A Player of the Game 100
possessions.description: You are learning about a singular new game.

possessions.name: A Procurer of Savage Beasts
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Procurer of Savage Beasts 5 - Accomplished Hunter
possessions.description: You brought them back alive, no matter how fierce, cunning or venomous.

possessions.name: Engaged in a Scheme: a Salon
possessions.nameAndLevel: Engaged in a Scheme: a Salon 4 - Your company is promising, and intriguing to others
possessions.levelDescription: Your company is promising, and intriguing to others
possessions.description: To ensure the success of Salon evenings, ensure you are properly prepared. When this rises high enough, you may be able to spend it on Making Waves.

possessions.name: A Scholar of the Correspondence
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Scholar of the Correspondence 11 - Cryptophilologist Emeritus
possessions.description: You consider yourself the foremost authority on the Correspondence in the Neath.
possessions.availableAt: Begin your study of the Correspondence with an Expedition to the Tomb of Seven, in the Forgotten Quarter.

possessions.name: A Shaper of Starved Culture
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Shaper of Starved Culture 23 - Your gifts are making quite an impression on the Starved Men
possessions.levelDescription: Your gifts are making quite an impression on the Starved Men
possessions.description: You have facilitated the exchange of cultural tokens with some factions of the Starved Men.

possessions.name: A Survivor of the Affair of the Box
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Survivor of the Affair of the Box 70 - The Gratitude of Mr Fires
possessions.description: You were hired to steal a box by a Stuttering Fence who may have betrayed you.
possessions.availableAt: Gain this in the Flit or Mahogany Hall; continue the story in Spite.

possessions.name: A Susurrus in the Soup Kitchen
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Susurrus in the Soup Kitchen 1 - Eery voices at Mrs Chapman's
possessions.description: Who makes all of Mrs Chapman's soups?

possessions.name: A Time for Generosity
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Time for Generosity 2 - What's a couple of days between friends?
possessions.levelDescription: What's a couple of days between friends?
possessions.description: You've given a little of your time, that most precious of resources.

possessions.name: A Turn in the Game
possessions.description: The Numismatrix has lost three of her most wonderful coins. Anyone who is anyone in the Game is striving to find them!

possessions.name: A Visitor to the Clay Quarters
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Visitor to the Clay Quarters 5
possessions.description: You have gained access to the Clay Quarters...

possessions.name: A Zailor in the Making
possessions.description: Discovering the secrets of the Unterzee.
possessions.availableAt: Gain this through opportunity cards.

possessions.name: Accepted Mr Fires' Ultimatum
possessions.description: You have agreed to deliver Clara's Hybrid child to Mr Fires.

possessions.name: Access to a Parabolan Base-Camp
possessions.description: You have a way to reach Parabola, and a place to stay there when you arrive.
possessions.availableAt: Silverers may create this in a Honey-Den. Other players may be given access by Silverers, or find an alternate route via a University Lab.

possessions.name: Access to Breakwater House
possessions.nameAndLevel: Access to Breakwater House 3 - You are welcomed in Breakwater
possessions.description: The Severe Bluejacket has called upon you to help set his wrongs to right.

possessions.name: Acquaintance with Helicon House
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquaintance with Helicon House 1 - You have the address of Helicon House
possessions.levelDescription: You have the address of Helicon House
possessions.description: You've heard of a gathering place for Rubbery Men engaged in the arts.

possessions.name: Acquainted with Sophia's
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquainted with Sophia's 1 - You are familiar with Sophia's Club in the Bazaar Side-Streets, and could become a member if you chose
possessions.levelDescription: You are familiar with Sophia's Club in the Bazaar Side-Streets, and could become a member if you chose
possessions.description: Sophia's is a private club catering to the monster-hunters who find London's other clubs soporific. The dinners are hearty, the conversation robust. You may pursue joining the Club at the Bazaar Side-Streets.

possessions.name: Acquainted with the Clay Tailor
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquainted with the Clay Tailor 1 - You are familiar with the Clay Tailor Club, and could become a member if you wished
possessions.levelDescription: You are familiar with the Clay Tailor Club, and could become a member if you wished
possessions.description: Clay Tailor is neither a shop nor a public house. It is a club, one of whose founders was an Ambitious Scarf. Invitations are always extended to a person in tandem with one of their items of clothing. 'M. Smith and her Infuriated Hat,' for instance. You may pursue the chance to join the Club in the Bazaar Side-Streets.

possessions.name: Acquiring Exhibits for the Labyrinth of Tigers
possessions.nameAndLevel: Acquiring Exhibits for the Labyrinth of Tigers 5 - Aided by the cunning of Mr Inch and the power of his menagerie, no quarry in London is safe from your pursuit
possessions.levelDescription: Aided by the cunning of Mr Inch and the power of his menagerie, no quarry in London is safe from your pursuit
possessions.description: You are supplying animals for zoological display. Live specimens fetch higher prices.

possessions.description: You have changed the world, and the world remembers. Every four weeks, you will be able to claim a reward in London. The nature of the reward will be determined by the choices you made in your Ambition.

possessions.name: A Diplomat in the Making -
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Diplomat in the Making - Going Places
possessions.description: Getting to know the working of the Foreign Office.

possessions.name: The Great Game: A Fine Piece in the Game -
possessions.nameAndLevel: The Great Game: A Fine Piece in the Game - A Veteran Spy
possessions.description: You have observed, stolen, followed, decrypted and occasionally murdered.

possessions.name: A Member in Good Standing -
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Member in Good Standing - Known at the Door
possessions.description: Your membership is in order.

possessions.name: A Memory of the Affair of the Ushabti
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Memory of the Affair of the Ushabti
possessions.description: You escaped the grasp of remembered limestone. This memory may beget an alteration somewhere in Parabola.

possessions.name: A Participant in the 1894 Election:
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Participant in the 1894 Election: A Veteran of London's first Mayoral campaign!
possessions.levelDescription: A Veteran of London's first Mayoral campaign!
possessions.description: The things you have witnessed. The scandals you have been privy to. The infamy of it all. The excitement. You were not a bystander when change came to London.

possessions.name: A Participant in the 1895 Election:
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Participant in the 1895 Election: A Veteran of London's second Mayoral campaign!
possessions.levelDescription: A Veteran of London's second Mayoral campaign!
possessions.description: The things you have witnessed. The scandals you have been privy to. The infamy of it all. The excitement. You were not a bystander when change came to London.

possessions.name: A Participant of the Hookman House Escapade
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Participant of the Hookman House Escapade
possessions.description: Once, a bold band of students returning from an extracurricular field trip to the ceiling crashed a dirigible into Hookman House. Thereby, they inconvenienced the Ministry of Public Decency, altered the London skyline, and became legends in perpetuity in the eyes of their fellow students. You are considered foremost among them. After all, it was your dirigible.

possessions.name: A Person of Some Importance -
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Person of Some Importance - A Legendary Charisma
possessions.description: Your influence is felt across London and beyond. Are you destined for greatness?
possessions.availableAt: If you want to become a Person of Importance, Increase Dangerous, Persuasive, Shadowy or Watchful to 100... and await the Ambitious Barrister.

possessions.name: A Power in Waiting -
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Power in Waiting - The Conscience of Empire
possessions.description: To what end do you wait, in the shadows of Empire?

possessions.name: A Professional Specialisation:
possessions.description: You possess a very particular, and very in-demand, set of skills.

possessions.name: A True Denizen of the Neath
possessions.nameAndLevel: A True Denizen of the Neath
possessions.description: You have completed your Ambition and resolved the matter that brought you to the Neath. Perhaps congratulations are in order. Perhaps they are not. Regardless, the Neath is more your home now than the Surface ever was.

possessions.name: A Veteran of the Battle of Wolfstack Docks -
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Veteran of the Battle of Wolfstack Docks - Dockside Legend
possessions.description: When all was lost, you turned the tide.

possessions.name: A Volunteer During the Great Sink of 1899
possessions.nameAndLevel: A Volunteer During the Great Sink of 1899
possessions.description: When London very nearly fell into a deep, dark hole – again – you did not sit idly by and watch your fellow citizen be swallowed up by the Earth.

possessions.name: Additional room in your wardrobe:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Additional room in your wardrobe: A spacious wardrobe
possessions.description: How much extra room do you have for outfit slots?

possessions.name: An Admirer of Beauty -
possessions.nameAndLevel: An Admirer of Beauty - Beautiful Company
possessions.description: You've enjoyed a close and cherished friendship with a Struggling Artist's Model.

possessions.name: An Editor of Newspapers -
possessions.nameAndLevel: An Editor of Newspapers - A Wealthy Baron of the Press
possessions.levelDescription: A Wealthy Baron of the Press
possessions.description: A guardian of the people! A defender of freedom! Well, perhaps.

possessions.name: An Explorer of the Unterzee -
possessions.nameAndLevel: An Explorer of the Unterzee - The Captain
possessions.description: Zailing the zeven zees.

possessions.name: Artisan of the Red Science
possessions.nameAndLevel: Artisan of the Red Science 7/7 - You have learned a little of the theory behind the Red Science
possessions.levelDescription: You have learned a little of the theory behind the Red Science
possessions.description: A knowledge that breaks chains and makes new links.

possessions.name: Closest To -
possessions.description: Who do you toast when nobody is listening?
possessions.availableAt: This can sometimes be changed on Connected cards.

possessions.name: Committed:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Committed: You are committed to a relationship
possessions.levelDescription: You are committed to a relationship
possessions.description: You are in an established relationship! Bound for all eternity to another by the common law! Is that not marvellous?

possessions.name: Distinction of Duplicity
possessions.description: Victory when nothing could be trusted. The lie that outlives the truth.

possessions.name: Distinction of Irreverence
possessions.description: Victory upon a shifting rubric. The joke told long after the jester's demise.

possessions.name: Enjoying Lethal Prominence -
possessions.nameAndLevel: Enjoying Lethal Prominence - A worthy target
possessions.description: You're now important enough to be worth murdering.

possessions.name: Free of Surface Ties -
possessions.nameAndLevel: Free of Surface Ties - A citizen below
possessions.description: You are a true child of the Neath. There is nothing left for you on the surface now.

possessions.name: Freed from the Name
possessions.description: You were wise enough to turn away from a terrible madness.

possessions.name: Glasswork
possessions.nameAndLevel: Glasswork 7/7 - You have gained a theory of the ways of Parabola
possessions.levelDescription: You have gained a theory of the ways of Parabola
possessions.description: The essential characteristic of a Silverer. Familiarity with the Fingerwork and knowledge of what lies behind the mirror.

possessions.name: The Unexpurgated Gazette: Hallowmas Edition of 1894 -
possessions.nameAndLevel: The Unexpurgated Gazette: Hallowmas Edition of 1894 -  The second page is dominated by a long-winded column, in which Mr Huffam praises the spirit of edification seen this Hallowmas. He cites your Accomplice as a most encouraging example and wishes her well in her studies
possessions.levelDescription: The second page is dominated by a long-winded column, in which Mr Huffam praises the spirit of edification seen this Hallowmas. He cites your Accomplice as a most encouraging example and wishes her well in her studies
possessions.description: A mention? Fame! When your Persuasive is 69 or more, this will reveal a new option on the One's Public opportunity card.

possessions.name: The Unexpurgated Gazette: Hallowmas Edition of 1895 -
possessions.nameAndLevel: The Unexpurgated Gazette: Hallowmas Edition of 1895 - 'Such wisdom. Such nobility of form. Such hardships endured.' The Matriarch is delighted with Huffam's write-up. So pleased is she that she magnanimously points to a paragraph near the end where you're described as a 'companion beyond measure' and an 'exemplary provider of treats'. That is indeed high praise, from her. Londoners will take note
possessions.levelDescription: 'Such wisdom. Such nobility of form. Such hardships endured.' The Matriarch is delighted with Huffam's write-up. So pleased is she that she magnanimously points to a paragraph near the end where you're described as a 'companion beyond measure' and an 'exemplary provider of treats'. That is indeed high praise, from her. Londoners will take note
possessions.description: A mention? Fame! When your Persuasive is 69 or more, this will reveal a new option on the One's Public opportunity card.

possessions.name: Kataleptic Toxicology
possessions.nameAndLevel: Kataleptic Toxicology 7/5 - You have begun to learn the theory of poisons, and of non-physical things that are like poison
possessions.levelDescription: You have begun to learn the theory of poisons, and of non-physical things that are like poison
possessions.description: A recent field of study dedicated to the toxins and alchemies of the Neath. It investigates substances like Prisoner's Honey, Attar, Cantigaster venom, Uttershroom spores, and Hesperidean Cider. It is favoured by those with fierce curiosity and very steady hands.

possessions.name: Looked Upon Fondly
possessions.description: You released the Hybrid on the ceiling, to be with its own kind. The false-stars know you, and shine with gratitude.

possessions.name: Mithridacy
possessions.nameAndLevel: Mithridacy 4/5 - You are good at suggesting falsehoods by saying only what is true
possessions.levelDescription: You are good at suggesting falsehoods by saying only what is true
possessions.description: The art of confusion and deception, of misleading the listener without a single false word.

possessions.name: Monstrous Anatomy
possessions.nameAndLevel: Monstrous Anatomy 7/7 - You know a good deal about where a creature keeps its spikes and talons
possessions.levelDescription: You know a good deal about where a creature keeps its spikes and talons
possessions.description: The field of study that tells you that steel knives won't work on this enemy, or that stabbing it in the lower back is likely to pierce the venom-sac.

possessions.name: Old Zalt:
possessions.nameAndLevel: Old Zalt: A Connoisseur of Zalty Language
possessions.description: 'When I was your age all we had were wooden ships with zails. Hardly any wind in the Neath, of course. Zee voyages took forever...'

possessions.name: Parabolan Commander
possessions.nameAndLevel: Parabolan Commander - A commander of little consequence
possessions.description: Your renown in the wars of Parabola.

possessions.name: Discovered: Parabolan Pavilion
possessions.description: The staging post for your sorties into dream.

possessions.name: General: Principle of Hollows
possessions.nameAndLevel: General: Principle of Hollows - You have augmented your General
possessions.description: A translucent serpentine Principle, cultivated in your Pavilion.

possessions.name: Profession:
possessions.description: Your true passion? Or just a way to earn a crust?

possessions.name: Restored to the Court of Her Enduring Majesty
possessions.nameAndLevel: Restored to the Court of Her Enduring Majesty
possessions.description: You have been returned to Court! The Captivating Princess has put in a very excellent word for you.

possessions.name: Shapeling Arts
possessions.nameAndLevel: Shapeling Arts 1/5 - You know a little about how to make a living thing into something else
possessions.levelDescription: You know a little about how to make a living thing into something else
possessions.description: A power of transformation.

possessions.name: Steward of the Discordance
possessions.description: An inkling, only, of how to protect against things that should not be known.

possessions.name: Successful Terms as Governor -
possessions.nameAndLevel: Successful Terms as Governor - Remembered by the people
possessions.description: You maintained peace and bolstered prosperity. The citizens hold you highly in their hearts.

possessions.name: The Cheery Man's Fate
possessions.description: The Cheery Man perished in his final encounter with his daughter.

possessions.name: The Darling of the Ambassador's Ball
possessions.nameAndLevel: The Darling of the Ambassador's Ball
possessions.description: The cream of society thought you most charming.
possessions.availableAt: Increase your "A Name Signed with a Flourish" quality to 3 by Making Your Name in Veilgarden, and stun the attendees at the Ambassador's Ball.

possessions.name: Discovered: The Maze-Gardens
possessions.description: You have found the gates of the king's labyrinth.

possessions.name: Discovered: the Museum of Prelapsarian History
possessions.nameAndLevel: Discovered: the Museum of Prelapsarian History
possessions.description: Formerly an abandoned estate near Veilgarden, now a facility for the edification of curious Londoners.

possessions.name: Discovered: The Streets of Polythreme
possessions.description: You have explored the port where all things are alive.

possessions.name: Unscarred by Law
possessions.description: You were scattered by the ash, but were unscathed.

possessions.name: Zeefaring
possessions.description: How to chart a course with unreliable maps; how to steer a ship through dangerous waters; how to hold a crew together against adversity.

possessions.name: Route: Bazaar Side-Streets
possessions.description: Your Shaper's Pass allows you to visit the work areas in the Bazaar Side-Streets.

possessions.name: Route: Doubt Street
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: Doubt Street – in the Spite map area
possessions.description: You know your way through the back-alleys of Spite to the thrumming printing-presses of Doubt Street.

possessions.name: Route: Lodgings
possessions.description: You have a home of your own.

possessions.name: Route: Mahogany Hall
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: Mahogany Hall – in the Spite map area
possessions.description: You know the ways through the twisting streets to Mahogany Hall.

possessions.name: Route: Mrs Plenty's Most Distracting Carnival
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: Mrs Plenty's Most Distracting Carnival
possessions.description: You know one of the safer ways to the Carnival on the edge of the Prickfinger Wastes.

possessions.name: Route: The Bone Market
possessions.description: You know where to find the market in the Department of Menace Eradication where bones are bought and sold.
possessions.availableAt: You can reach this from the Department of Menace Eradication.

possessions.name: Route: The Cave of the Nadir
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: The Cave of the Nadir – You know the way... and you've sold that information to the Calendar Council
possessions.levelDescription: – You know the way... and you've sold that information to the Calendar Council
possessions.description: The Nadir lies somewhere beneath the Forgotten Quarter. Do you know where?
possessions.availableAt: The Secular Missionary is seeking her archaeologist husband. Perhaps he knows where it lies.

possessions.name: Route: The Chessboard
possessions.description: Have you found your way to the Chessboard in Parabola? Could you get back there if you needed to?

possessions.name: Route: The Dome of Scales
possessions.description: You know the way to the Dome of Scales.
possessions.availableAt: You may be able to find your way here from a Parabolan Base-Camp.

possessions.name: Route: The Flit
possessions.description: You know the ways up to the Flit.

possessions.name: Route: The Forgotten Quarter
possessions.description: A way has opened for you to the Forgotten Quarter.

possessions.name: Route: The Labyrinth of Tigers
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: The Labyrinth of Tigers – in the Ladybones Road map area
possessions.levelDescription: – in the Ladybones Road map area
possessions.description: You have a season pass to the notorious Labyrinth of Tigers.

possessions.name: Route: The Reflection of your Laboratory
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: The Reflection of your Laboratory
possessions.description: You know your way to the Reflection of a Laboratory.
possessions.availableAt: You may be able to find your way here from a Parabolan Base-Camp.

possessions.name: Route: The Shuttered Palace
possessions.description: You've gained entrance to the Shuttered Palace.

possessions.name: Route: the Singing Mandrake
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: the Singing Mandrake – in the Veilgarden map area
possessions.description: You've found the sticky-floored local for those Londoners with creative inclinations.

possessions.name: Route: The University
possessions.nameAndLevel: Route: The University – in the Veilgarden map area
possessions.description: You've gained entry to the University.

possessions.name: Route: The Viric Jungle
possessions.description: You have found your way to the Viric outskirts of Parabola.
possessions.availableAt: You may be able to find your way here from a Parabolan Base-Camp.

possessions.name: Route: The Waswood
possessions.description: You know the way to the Waswood.
possessions.availableAt: You may be able to find this in a Parabolan Base-Camp.

possessions.name: Route: Wilmot's End
possessions.description: You know the secret ways to the monument-crusted den of spies.

possessions.name: Route: Wolfstack Docks
possessions.description: You have the permits necessary to visit the Docks.

possessions.name: Attending a Mayoral Ball
possessions.description: The final event of the Mayor's calendar, before he or she departs office.

possessions.name: Notoriety: Election
possessions.description: Someone has noticed your interference. For completing either an Election Flash Lay or Case as an Agitator, you may now be targeted by an Agitator's mob. This quality will go away after you have been targeted. You may regain it if you complete another Election Flash Lay or Case.

possessions.name: Influencing the Election
possessions.description: You've been working on the cobbles to help your candidate's mayoral bid.

possessions.name: Not Supporting the Dauntless Temperance Campaigner
possessions.nameAndLevel: Not Supporting the Dauntless Temperance Campaigner 1
possessions.description: You're not interested in the promise of 'Teatime for London.'

possessions.name: Not Supporting the Implacable Detective
possessions.description: You're not interested in 'The Only Logical Conclusion.'

possessions.name: Winnings from your Debates
possessions.description: You have walked away with contributions from the crowd.

possessions.name: A Subscription to the Gazette and a Whetted Pair of Scissors
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Subscription to the Gazette and a Whetted Pair of Scissors
possessions.description: Now you need never be concerned about destroying your own copy. You can have your paper-with-eye-holes and read it.

possessions.name: Apian Coronet
possessions.description: Chitin and bone and nevercold brass. The twinned perfumes of wine and honey. A feverish warmth across your brow. Would you not be a worthy ruler?

possessions.name: Aria of Tranquillity
possessions.description: A melody from Dahut. Quiets turbulent minds and waters.

possessions.name: Diabolical Fascinator
possessions.description: The stinger of one of the old aristocrats of Hell, refashioned into a bayonet deployed in defence of the New Democracy, and refashioned again into an intimidating hair ornament!

possessions.name: Epicurean War-Helm
possessions.description: A voracious, spiked helmet, spattered with dried blood and condiments. Worn when stalking the most deadly and delicious of prey.

possessions.name: Gant Bowler of Fiduciary Responsibility
possessions.nameAndLevel: 2 x Gant Bowler of Fiduciary Responsibility
possessions.description: Exposure to noxious fumes has driven many a milliner mad. This bowler carries a whiff of solvent, and turns the mind inexorably to matters rational, fiscal and economical.

possessions.name: Iron Hat
possessions.description: You can't go wrong with an iron hat. Except that you look ridiculous. That's a problem, certainly. Also, it rusts; it punishes the innocent vertebrae of the neck; it attracts urchins who enjoy the cheery ping of a hat-bounced pebble. It is, nevertheless, proof against dart, bullet, and light glim-fall.

possessions.name: Judgemental Hat
possessions.description: This hat claims (at length) to have adorned a traveller of the High Wilderness. It is not impressed with its present resting-place; neither with the Neath in general, nor with your head specifically. However, securely positioned sur ta tête, its scorn is directed outwards. Occasionally, it tuts.

possessions.name: Mask of the Rose
possessions.description: Mysterious and alluring. A vital accessory for revels on the Feast of the Exceptional Rose.

possessions.name: Modish Bonnet
possessions.description: Very eye-catching! But is the effect quite what you hoped for?

possessions.name: Pirate Hat
possessions.description: Ridiculous, flamboyant or menacing? You be the judge.

possessions.name: Prisoner's Mask
possessions.description: For some reason they make these things out of satin. A great deal of stale beer has been spilt on it though. You wouldn't wear it to a masked ball.

possessions.name: Sneak-Thief's Mask
possessions.description: Gorchett & Sons: Rendering You Usefully Anonymous Since 1851.

possessions.name: Sporing Bonnet
possessions.description: Are those really mushrooms? If they are, why do they whisper so? How is it they have taken root in your hair, and in your dreams? Who is Madame Limpid?

possessions.name: The Forsaken Crown of a Grand Devil
possessions.nameAndLevel: 2 x The Forsaken Crown of a Grand Devil
possessions.description: The colossal, many-tined, still-smouldering cast-off of a Grand Devil of Mt Palmerston. It is far too large to wear, but its monumental extravagance speaks to its nobility.

possessions.name: Tuneful Hat
possessions.description: Bright, cheery, effortlessly musical. The envy of all – but your neighbours, who have begged that you put a sock in it, come bedtime.

possessions.name: Unobtrusive Bowler Hat
possessions.description: A cranial accoutrement so common that one could easily be lost in the crowd.

possessions.name: A Cured Jillyfleur Cloak
possessions.description: The flesh has been brined, rather than leathered. All the unpleasant oozy bits have  been yanked out. You now do indeed have eyes in (or at least on) your back.

possessions.name: Academic Gown
possessions.description: To achieve this distinction, you have certainly proved your Watchfulness. Black is the colour of academic respectability. It billows impressively when you run, too.

possessions.name: Barrel with Leather Shoulder-Straps
possessions.description: Are you really going to wear it?

possessions.name: Bloodstained Suit
possessions.description: Grey-dyed second-hand nankeen. It's seen one too many nights at the Medusa's Head. That may even be some of your blood on there.

possessions.name: Bundle of Fourth City Rags
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Bundle of Fourth City Rags
possessions.description: This threadbare garment whispers to you in your dreams. When you wake, sometimes you remember.

possessions.name: Bundle of Glad Rags
possessions.description: Trimmed with tattered ribbons and dyed quite a courageous colour.

possessions.name: Concealing Skirt
possessions.description: Lengthy, modest, and replete with concealed pouches and pockets.

possessions.name: Discarded Warden's Garb
possessions.description: They called these guards the 'Beefeaters', once. They left the Tower with the ravens, and hunger now for rarer meats than beef.

possessions.name: Hardy Oilskin
possessions.description: Tough, waterproof, and with a collar to keep the spray out of your eyes. All that, and breathable too!

possessions.name: Inconspicuous Overalls
possessions.description: Faded, weathered, and layered with just the right amount of grime and soot. Nobody looks twice at the handyman.

possessions.name: Neddy Suit
possessions.description: 'Yer basic tatty suit, wiv deep pockets an' a little loop for yer stick...' The kind of garb that a neddy-man might wear on the business of the Masters.

possessions.name: Obscurant's Shawl
possessions.description: The garb of those who work the looms. To wear it is to set aside your future, and all the joys and burdens that would come with it.

possessions.name: Outfit of Black Felt Garments
possessions.nameAndLevel: 4 x Outfit of Black Felt Garments
possessions.description: Warm, dark, and unobtrusive, like a stealthy cup of cocoa in a darkened back street.

possessions.name: Protective Labcoat
possessions.description: Clothes to keep the vilest stains off your real clothes.

possessions.name: Rough Gown
possessions.description: This gown has seen hard wear... and survived it.

possessions.name: Shabby Opera Cloak
possessions.description: The years and the moths haven't been kind. But this is still a garment that enhances the pose and the sweep.

possessions.name: Smock of Four Thousand Three Hundred and Eight Pockets
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Smock of Four Thousand Three Hundred and Eight Pockets
possessions.description: Each pocket contains an instrument of highly specific utility. Marvel at the Salt-Lens, at the Trip-Clock, at the Mangler-Piece.

possessions.name: Tatterskin Shawl
possessions.description: Once, you offended the Boil of Calamities. To make amends you offered up your own skin as a gift. The Boil was thoughtful enough to return your old skin to you, though it no longer fits as snugly as once it did.

possessions.name: Topsy Tailcoat
possessions.description: Made out of whisper-satin and lined with two dozen hidden pockets. If you wear the right clothes, they'll hold the door open as you strip the place bare.

possessions.name: Avid Glove
possessions.description: The Avid Glove is a marvel of surgery and tailoring! Although it can be complicated to shake hands.

possessions.name: Eager Glove
possessions.description: Eyes and teeth are discomfiting in an article of clothing, but useful.

possessions.name: Keelgraspers
possessions.description: They have been to the peligin depths from which no living thing returns. They hold tightly to the rigging, lest they sink there again.

possessions.name: Pair of Cracksman's Mittens
possessions.description: By villains, for villains.

possessions.name: Pair of Cutpurse's Mittens
possessions.description: Ragged and filthy, but the luck of the Flit clings to them.

possessions.name: Pair of Dancemaster's Dabs
possessions.description: Irreproachably dainty. Not really a boxer's first choice.

possessions.name: Pair of Lenguals
possessions.description: Polythreme's finest: gloves that can taste! And speak! And salivate!

possessions.name: Pair of Spiderchitin Gauntlets
possessions.description: Lovingly oiled to prevent unnerving clicks and creaks.

possessions.name: Pugilist's Hello
possessions.description: A merry gift commemorating the festive season. Stretched leather, ruddy as a gin drinker's nose and trussed like a crackling ham. Packs a hefty wallop, to be bestowed liberally in a seasonally apposite manner.

possessions.name: Singed and Stained Work Gloves
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Singed and Stained Work Gloves
possessions.description: A memento of when London almost fell for a second time. These hardy gloves have seen their share of picking through rubble and handling dangerous materials.

possessions.name: Sun-Seared Silken Gloves
possessions.description: White as the beaches of Aestival, these gossamer-light adornments remember the warmth of the sun. Perfect for a foggy London season.

possessions.name: A Brooding Aura of Pain
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Brooding Aura of Pain
possessions.description: Your scars go deeper than the skin.

possessions.name: A Faceted Decanter of Drownie Effluvia
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Faceted Decanter of Drownie Effluvia
possessions.description: It has, mercifully, been bottled. Apparently this fluid coats the waters above Dahut, the City of Peace. Is it tears? Song-residue?

possessions.name: A Journal of Metaphysical Conjecture
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Journal of Metaphysical Conjecture
possessions.description: Perhaps truths are contained herein - obscured by riddles, misconceptions and near unintelligible handwriting.

possessions.name: A Posy of the Neath's Finest Flowers
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Posy of the Neath's Finest Flowers
possessions.description: Elegant. Refined. Literally intoxicating. And wonderfully expensive.

possessions.name: A Shard of Law-Glass
possessions.description: Crystallised from furnace runoff. A piece of unintended law that defies all attempts to read it.

possessions.name: Ace of Hats
possessions.description: This card has been well-used. It's too marked to cheat with, now, but it's still good for sliding open locks.

possessions.name: Amber Cello
possessions.description: Steel ribs and amber fittings give it a deep and echoing resonance. The trapped insects accentuate the wolf note.

possessions.name: Ancient Hunting Rifle
possessions.description: Commonplace This thing is dangerous to everyone.

possessions.name: Bag of Station VIII 'Humbugs'
possessions.description: Flavoured with extract of derision and distillation of denial. The taste is terrible, but deceptively moreish.

possessions.name: Bejewelled Cane
possessions.description: Excuse me? Could you put a cover on that? It's blinding the butler.

possessions.name: Clandestine Candle
possessions.description: Even the most experienced smuggler needs light on the Stolen River. Those waters are hungry, and swallow the unwary without trace.

possessions.name: Consignment of Scintillack Snuff
possessions.description: Fill your nostrils with argent fire!

possessions.name: Drownie Song of the Deep
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Drownie Song of the Deep
possessions.description: The melody recalls lightless, blood-freezing depths.

possessions.name: Evergreen Bough
possessions.description: Somehow, it's still green, and possesses the whiplike flexibility of new growth. A marvel of arboreal preservation, and guaranteed to leave welts on any assailant.

possessions.name: Everlasting Candle
possessions.description: An ordinary candle, inscribed with tiny symbols of Correspondence. No darkness can abash its bold green flame. Ideal for birthday parties.

possessions.name: M. D_____' A_____ for _______: F____ Edition
possessions.description: A guidebook for would-be zee explorers – if only a Ministry auditor hadn't savaged it with black ink. There's still useful information to glean from the included maps.

possessions.name: Honest Butcher's Tool
possessions.description: The toxin coating the tip is designed to move the victim only partially towards death. It is rather odd, then, that it's on the end of such a vicious weapon.

possessions.name: Mark of Disdain
possessions.description: A sooty black cinder, smouldering with a sigil in the Correspondence. From one angle: 'TO SUCCUMB AT THE MOMENT OF GREATEST PRESSURE'. From another: 'DISAPPOINTMENT'. Careful; it's hot.

possessions.name: Nodule of Violet Amber
possessions.description: Do you recall how they came to that place? And we sang of our lightnings and shapeful disgrace? They tilted their vanes and ennobled their spires. We welcomed them then and commingled all choirs. If we could remember those days. If only we could remember.
possessions.availableAt: Take Warm Amber to the Nadir, and hope. The Nadir can be found, with difficulty, in the Forgotten Quarter.

possessions.name: Nodule of Warm Amber
possessions.description: Coveted An eye-sized chunk of deep amber. Disturbingly warm to the touch. But oddly hard to put down.
possessions.availableAt: Find these in certain Bundles of Oddities, or by calling in favours with Rubbery Men.  Expeditions in the Forgotten Quarter also occasionally uncover them.

possessions.name: Nuncian Pocket Watch
possessions.description: It marks time with the regular efficiency of an overworked schoolmistress, and comes with more concealed lock-picks than possessed by the finest London cat-burglars. An officer of the post is always prepared.

possessions.name: Patent Scrutinizer
possessions.description: Commonplace The only weapon a consulting detective needs.
possessions.availableAt: Create this by using other Luminosity items in your inventory.

possessions.name: Plate of Scandalously Buttered Scones
possessions.nameAndLevel: 3 x Plate of Scandalously Buttered Scones
possessions.description: Your Aunt spent the bulk of her better years perfecting the recipe. She kept it close, but accidentally revealed it – along with an array of shocking family secrets – during a memorable and sherry-soaked visit to your lodgings. She regretted it immediately, making you swear you would always apply the jam before the cream, as God intended.

possessions.name: Polythreme Drinking Vessel
possessions.description: A sweetener of prospective voters when full. A chastiser of the enemy's supporters when empty.

possessions.name: Prison Shiv
possessions.description: A chisel wrapped in a rag: a prisoner's weapon.

possessions.name: Rattus Faber Rifle
possessions.description: Coveted A rat-scaled weapon! Horribly fiddly to load. But a deadly surprise at close range.

possessions.name: Scrimshander Carving Knife
possessions.description: This is a proper historian's knife. Sharp enough to carve dates into Scrimshander's bone-books. Tough enough to obliterate unwanted histories.

possessions.name: M. Demeaux's Advice for Captains: Second Edition
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x M. Demeaux's Advice for Captains: Second Edition
possessions.description: A heavily-redacted guidebook, on the dangers of the Unterzee and its depths. "First Mate C______ volunteered to ... the diving .... We waited ... silence ... coast of .... After twenty ... returned ... screaming ... a lady ... black."

possessions.name: Shuttered Cake
possessions.description: This cake was prepared for the Traitor Empress on the anniversary of the Fall, but she refused even to look at it. Its filling is as light as a raincloud. Its candles burn a melancholy blue. Its icing is black as midnight, as delicate as filigree, and as fragile as a heart.

possessions.name: Sturdy Pick
possessions.description: Your aunt's name is engraved in the handle. It looks like it's been through several wars.
possessions.availableAt: Maybe you already have one of those lying around? Look in your Lodgings.

possessions.name: The DF
possessions.description: The Deleterious Featurette is said to have been the last thing one of the Neath's greatest wits ever wrote.

possessions.name: The Thief With Neither Face nor Name
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x The Thief With Neither Face nor Name
possessions.description: Your spate of enigmatic thefts baffled the Constables, and inspired this penny dreadful.

possessions.name: Completely Unassuming Palaeontological Accessory
possessions.description: Palaeontologists aim to unearth the dead. In the Neath, they’re also prepared to put them down.

possessions.name: Meticulously Altered Stocking
possessions.description: Something otherworldly wore this. Something, perhaps, that can see with its feet. No: that's an absurd idea.

possessions.name: Pair of Balmoral Boots
possessions.description: They lace high and are lined with something resembling sheepskin, but more pungent.

possessions.name: Pair of Defenestrating Boots
possessions.description: Reasonably fashionable, comfortable and sturdy enough that the breaking glass won't scratch their leather.

possessions.name: Pair of Leg Irons
possessions.description: Heavy as a wretched memory.

possessions.name: Pair of Savage Hob-Nailed Boots
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Pair of Savage Hob-Nailed Boots
possessions.description: The nails strike satisfying sparks on the cobbled streets. Some will fear you. All will hear you coming.

possessions.name: Pair of Spidersilk Slippers
possessions.description: All spider eggs have most likely been removed.

possessions.name: Pair of Stylish Riding Boots
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Pair of Stylish Riding Boots
possessions.description: They gleam magnificently. It would almost be a shame to soil them with anything as rough-and-tumble as actual equestrianism.

possessions.name: Scrimshaw Sabatons
possessions.description: The bone-plate armour of a Scrivener-Knight of Remembrance, a hero of Scrimshander from ages past. The stories of her heroism are carved into the bone.

possessions.name: Wax-Hardened Boots
possessions.description: Encased in a thick coat of crimson tallow, these boots are robust. You need not fear cobbles nor mud nor tacks dropped by rival campaigners again.

possessions.name: Wrecking Boots
possessions.description: Favoured in the far below port of Wrack, these boots are tough as, well, old boots. They are friend of the saboteur, the wrecker and the pirate, but the enemy of the honest zailor. Such as they are.

possessions.name: A Submerged Rector
possessions.description: He speaks fervently of Low Barnet, an underwater congregation of tolling bells and crooked crosses. They tell wild stories down there, which the Rector likes to repeat. He's marvellous value at parties.

possessions.name: Acerbic Clay Man
possessions.description: Small talk, he contends, is a luxury of the flesh.

possessions.name: Acquisitive Magpie Advisor
possessions.description: No longer interested in things that glitter. It prefers things that flicker – the light of a candle, the eyes of a liar, the peeling edges of a snuffer's face...

possessions.name: An Antediluvian Ushabti
possessions.description: A relic of the Nile-Kings. A servant during and after death. Place it in front of a mirror before you dream.

possessions.name: An Urchin with a Fondness for Cowls and Capes
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x An Urchin with a Fondness for Cowls and Capes
possessions.description: She was once Mr Dinners. She will not be again.

possessions.name: Araby Fighting-Weasel
possessions.description: Scarce A ferocious little fellow. Sleek, proud, cunning, sharp-too— stand still, d__n you! Where has it gone?

possessions.name: Aurochs
possessions.description:
Aurochs eat voraciously, and grow inconveniently fast. For all its size, it's surprisingly gentle, eating delicately around your hand as you feed it.

Parts of this creature may be replicable along the railway, if you have the technology.

possessions.name: Blemmigan Tourist
possessions.description: This mushroom enjoys leisurely excursions. One with a sensible itinerary, and plenty of stops for cake.

possessions.name: Canny Costermonger
possessions.description: It's very easy to underestimate this one. You think she rather likes that.

possessions.name: Celebrated Weasel
possessions.description: London loves the Celebrated Weasel, a weasel that sings popular music-hall songs! Unfortunately, that means you cannot leave your house without being asked for an introduction, or for its autograph. Your weasel conveys no remorse.

possessions.name: Cheerful Goldfish
possessions.description: A happy addition to your household.

possessions.name: Complaisant Frost-Moth
possessions.description: It requires the occasional candle: but it's docile, even biddable. Does it see something in you?

possessions.name: Curious Contrarian
possessions.description: Erstwhile Mayor and longtime irritant, the Contrarian is happy for your paths to cross every now and then, and for you to see (and upset) the world together.

possessions.name: Debonair Palaeontologist
possessions.description: Their fashions and their findings are both questionable. They assemble ancient bones the way your gin-soaked aunt assembles jigsaws, banging them into place if they don't fit. They often declare 'Nothing lubricates proper palaeontology like rum.' They are excellent value at parties.

possessions.name: Deshrieked Mandrake
possessions.description: Soak one mandrake root in solution herbs, formaldehyde, in order to blunt its shriek. Leave in cage with songbird, nine weeks. Serve.

possessions.name: Dr Schlomo
possessions.description: "The essence of good analysis is clarity. So I must tell you that I require three things in your company. That you do nothing to embarrass me. That your behaviour continues to be interesting enough to validate my time in studying you. And that you provide me with more of that superlative tobacco."

possessions.name: Enigmatic Augur
possessions.description: ''Don't worry – I know how this all turns out. I've read it in the cards. For now, avoid tall dark strangers. I cannot abide competition.''

possessions.name: Esoteric Accomplice
possessions.description: Salutations. Might I borrow one of your books again? I promise I shan't cause this one to ignite.

possessions.name: Ex-Privateer Charter Clerk
possessions.description: She has connections all over the Neath; most of them suspect individuals of a plunderous inclination.

possessions.name: Fairly Tame Sorrow-Spider
possessions.description: You are reasonably certain that this spider will only climb legs and bite eyes when so instructed by its owner.

possessions.name: Focused Albatross
possessions.description: Wide wings. Quite a lot of beak. And then, where the body should be, a distortion point like something in a funhouse mirror. Looking at it makes your eyes water.
possessions.availableAt: The Focused Albatross may be hunted in Parabola.

possessions.name: Forty-Nine-Voiced Warbler
possessions.description: It compliments and soothes. Everywhere it goes, it reassures people that their nightmares are meaningless and their fears unfounded, that their skin is smooth and their scales glowing.

possessions.name: Grubby Urchin
possessions.description: Sly, agile, and moderately reliable.

possessions.name: Haunted Goldfish
possessions.description: It cannot forget the things it has seen.

possessions.name: Honey-Mazed Bear
possessions.description: An ordinary performing bear, if that is not a contradiction in terms. Only it got into a keg of Prisoner's Honey and enjoyed the experience far too much for its own good.

possessions.name: Hungover Terrier
possessions.description: This dog has probably had enough absinthe to last a lifetime.
possessions.availableAt: Find him at a clandestine rendezvous in Watchmaker's Hill

possessions.name: Inquisitive Lamp-cat
possessions.description: Ever-curious and lithe as an otter. Its purr is the low bubble of a simmering kettle.

possessions.name: Lucky Weasel
possessions.description: We don't mean he brings luck to you. Things just work out for this cheery little fellow.

possessions.name: Memorious Goldfish
possessions.description: The exception that proves the rule.

possessions.name: Midnight Matriarch of the Menagerie of Roses
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x Midnight Matriarch of the Menagerie of Roses
possessions.description: Long absent from the palace, the Matriarch has added street smarts to her political savvy. There is little she cannot see; there are few places she cannot go. It is best, perhaps, to assume she's watching – she is generous enough to rarely express judgement.

possessions.name: Murderous Monkey
possessions.description: After an unexpected absence of many hours, she came back late one night. You had to wash blood out of her fur in the bathtub. Since then she's been ever so calm.

possessions.name: Perforated Diver
possessions.description: Riven with harpoon hook-barbs. He says little, and leaks much.

possessions.name: Portable Fingerking Moot
possessions.description: Their seven-fold heads claim to consider all viewpoints, but their deliberations pull inexorably to the same conclusion. If you can bend them to the matter at hand, those nearby will be ensnared by the multitude of their arguments.

possessions.name: Prismatic Squidling
possessions.description: The changeable skin of a chameleon coupled with a desperate need for attention. It wafts winsomely around your head, adopting the colouration and pattern of your outfit.

possessions.name: Quizzical Squirrel
possessions.description: Its delicate paws reach for you as it leaps from the wardrobe to your shoulder. It gazes up at you, filled with eager curiosity. Its fluffy stinging tail curls in a question mark above its head.

possessions.name: Reprehensible Lizard
possessions.description: A lizard who has seen life, and has no regrets.

possessions.name: Revolutionary Firebrand
possessions.description: He has lost some of what he was to the Nadir. But with time, he may recover.

possessions.name: Rubbery Euphonium
possessions.description: A delicate confection of polished amber tubes and valves. Properly handled, it produces a haunting 'quack' noise.

possessions.name: Scuttering Squad
possessions.description: The Scuttering Company: a rapacious mercenary army operating out of a baronet's larder somewhere west of Watchmaker's Hill. They may loan you a squad of especially irregular troopers for a long-term contract. The cancellation clause is pretty punishing, though.

possessions.name: Seven-Throated Warbler
possessions.description: It lives wild now, but it was bred to give testimony in the courts. Concerned with evidence, motives, and explanations, whether accurate or not. Sometimes one throat contradicts another.

possessions.name: Suave Henchman
possessions.description: Thanks to elocution lessons from the devils, he has mastered the art of charm. Such power being wielded by one so ruthless is terrifying, not endearing. Still, he's on your side, which makes it entirely all right.

possessions.name: Sulky Bat
possessions.description: Where are my sodding crickets?

possessions.name: Sun-Kissed Polymath
possessions.description: He has a knack for almost everything – even mischief is a skill in need of practise.

possessions.name: Talkative Rattus Faber
possessions.description: Yes. Yes, I know. Yes! Just shut up for a moment. Let me think!

possessions.name: The Minister of Culture
possessions.description: His true title is "Lord of Inks, Curator of Quills, and Witness to All the Years of the Phoenix."

possessions.name: The Pirate-Poet
possessions.description: Every yard of her clay skin is crammed with tattooed poetry. ''Wrote it myself.'' She looks you up and down. ''Think you're worth a verse?''

possessions.name: Tomb-Lion
possessions.description: Regal and threatening. But, dear God, the smell...
possessions.availableAt: You may encounter one when exiled to the Tomb-Colonies.

possessions.name: Untrained Lyrebird
possessions.description:
It is a spectacular singer, once it has learned to impersonate musicians rather than police whistles and donkey brays.

It may provide a helpful distraction now and then during a heist.

possessions.name: Untried Tracklayer
possessions.description: An experienced metalworker with little understanding of the ways of the Neath. Perhaps, under your wing, he'll survive.

possessions.name: Violantly Mercantile Cuttlefish
possessions.description: An inveterate invertebrate haggler, it punctuates its written negotiations with ripples of violant and irrigo across its skin. It always gets a hefty discount.

possessions.name: Weary Wayfinder
possessions.description: Maps lie, and geography cannot be trusted. The inconstancies of the zee have exhausted them; they chart a course to more reliable waters.

possessions.name: Weasel of Social Discomfiture
possessions.description: It is a weasel possessed by a Fingerking. Its stare makes celebrated lecturers retire to the back room with dry heaves. Its smile desolates seasoned politicians.

possessions.name: Weasel of Woe
possessions.description: It's not the weasel's woe. No, this weasel brings you misfortune.

possessions.name: Wretched Mog
possessions.description: A deeply unendearing feline.

possessions.name: The Memory
possessions.description: You will change beyond all understanding, but something of you will remain.

possessions.name: A Hard-Earned Knack for Repair
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Hard-Earned Knack for Repair
possessions.description: When ruin came to London's streets, you were there – bearing brooms, bandages, and buttresses.

enhancements.qualityName: Noticed by the Queen of Air and Darkness

possessions.name: A Member of the Order of Those Who Will Not Be Caught Red-Handed
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x A Member of the Order of Those Who Will Not Be Caught Red-Handed
possessions.description: A society of libertines and players of red games. It is an occult and secret society, not to be spoken of beyond the curtained rooms in which it meets. Equip this in your Affiliation slot to add the associated Opportunity Card to your deck.

possessions.name: A Reverie of Heroism
possessions.description: Within an imperilled remnant of what once was, you sacrificed a precious thing. A shadow of what you destroyed lingers on in the deep, distorted memories of Londoners.

possessions.name: A Salon
possessions.description: Your parlour is a haven for the arts and a locus of philosophies. You are a host of epic stature. Make sure they all know it.

possessions.name: An Initiate into the Perfumer's Arts
possessions.nameAndLevel: 1 x An Initiate into the Perfumer's Arts
possessions.description: You know a little of how scent can be used to cloud the senses, alter histories, or end a life.

possessions.name: Gang of Hoodlums
